functional_requirements.title: Receipt Photo Capture
functional_requirements.description: The system shall allow users to photograph receipts using the device camera with auto-crop and image quality validation

functional_requirements.title: Automatic OCR Data Extraction
functional_requirements.description: The system shall automatically extract amount, date, vendor name, and payment method from receipt images using OCR with ≥90% accuracy

functional_requirements.title: Expense Categorisation
functional_requirements.description: The system shall categorise expenses into predefined categories with automatic suggestion and manual override

functional_requirements.title: Custom Category Creation
functional_requirements.description: The system shall allow users to create, edit, and delete custom expense categories

functional_requirements.title: Monthly and Quarterly Report Generation
functional_requirements.description: The system shall generate monthly and quarterly expense reports with category breakdowns, totals, and trend comparisons

functional_requirements.title: Report Export (PDF and CSV)
functional_requirements.description: The system shall export expense reports as PDF and CSV formats

functional_requirements.title: Year-End Tax Summary
functional_requirements.description: The system shall generate a year-end tax summary matching HMRC self-assessment categories

functional_requirements.title: Budget Setting Per Category
functional_requirements.description: The system shall allow users to set monthly spending budget limits per expense category

functional_requirements.title: Budget Threshold Push Notifications
functional_requirements.description: The system shall send push notifications when spending reaches 80% and 100% of budget

functional_requirements.title: Weekly Spending Summary Notification
functional_requirements.description: The system shall send a weekly spending summary push notification every Sunday evening

functional_requirements.title: Email/Password Authentication
functional_requirements.description: The system shall support user registration and login via email and password

functional_requirements.title: Biometric Authentication
functional_requirements.description: The system shall support optional biometric login for returning users

assumptions.description: Predefined categories align with HMRC self-assessment
